_comment: This file is for reference only. The aggregator skips any responses/*.json file whose name starts with EXAMPLE.

scifact:hard_filter:claim_99:doc_2151771.notes: Slight wrinkle in the policy text but reads as a real evidence-extraction call.

scifact:hard_map:claim_77.notes: Verifier requires the basis enum to be 'direct_support' but the abstract supports the claim only with a paraphrase. I would accept either 'direct_support' or 'partial_support' here.

swebench_verified:hard_filter:django__dj.notes: Hardened constraint asks for files 'directly' modified in the gold patch, but two of the gold-patched files are auto-generated. Verifier rejects answers that exclude them; I would accept those exclusions.
